titleStmt.title: SII 39.83: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 83. (A.R. No. 83 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌLANATHA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL. (INSIDE) MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KULAŚĒKHARA DĒVA-7TH YEAR.

summary.p: Badly damaged. It seems to refers to a gift of land as kārāṇmai Tirunamaṭṭukkāni by some private individuals viz., Semmaṅguḍaiya Veliyāṟṟḍaiyāṉ, Kuvalayattu-Araiyan-Chokkaṇ, Āṇḍapillaiyar to the temple of Tirukkōḷakkuḍi-uḍaiyanāyaṉār at Tirukkōḷakkuḍi in Puramalaināḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟupaṉmarāṉ [ tiribhuvaṉac cakkaravarttikaḷ] śrī kulacekara tevaṟku yāṇṭu 7 vatu tai mātam puṟamalai nāṭṭut tirukkoḷakkum Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār Āticaṇṭeśvara te
vaṟku Uṭaiyāṉ namaccivāya tevaṟum Ivviruvomum kārāṇmai tirunāmattuk kāṇipiṭi pāṭupaṇṇikku
ṭutta paricāvatu cempaṅkuṭaiya veḷiyāṟṟūruṭaiyāḷ kuvalaiyattaraiyaṉ cokkaṉārum kuvalaiyattalaiyaṉ Āṇṭappiḷḷaiyāruḷḷiṭṭa ka
Iṉnāyaṉārkku tirunāmattuk kāṇiyākak kuṭuttu tirukkaimalarile Utakamum paṇṇi Innilattāl Uḷḷa koṇṭu Aṉupavittu kārāṇmai tirunāyaṟṟuk kāṇiyāka kuṭuttu Ippaṭikki
cantirātittavar celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār Āticaṇṭeśvaratevaṟku tiruvettal kāraveḷarum vettal Ammaiyār piḷḷai
Digital edition of SII 39.83 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
